commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Claude CLI OAuth 401 classification ahead of generic provider-auth handling, emits a combined Claude/OpenClaw re-auth command, and adds classifier plus reply-path regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +92, Tests +188. Total +280 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main misses the Claude CLI 401 OAuth text and checks generic provider-auth before OAuth-refresh handling in the reply path. The PR body now includes real Claude CLI 401 terminal output, but I did not run it in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review should choose the canonical landing branch for the linked issue; no narrow automated repair remains on this PR.
